commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=70cf07eabeac079727f530409bb33867945c269b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Control UI assistant avatar localStorage from a flat browser-local avatar to an `agents` map keyed by agent id, passes agent id through the assistant identity controller, and adds controller regression tests.

PR surface: Source +50, Tests +59. Total +109 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible from current main: the storage helper uses one global key and render/controller paths read it without an agent id, matching the linked issue steps. I did not run a browser flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs author or maintainer follow-up for the remaining render-path bug plus contributor-supplied real behavior proof before merge.

target.title: fix(ui): scope local assistant avatar overrides per agent (#90890)
